name: TOB-V2 (TQQQ Opening Break — VWAP Entry)

entry_rules.step_1_qqq_filter: QQQ open must be >= previous day close (gap >= 0%)
entry_rules.step_2_orb_signal: TSLA first 15-min candle (9:30-9:44 AM ET) must close >= 0.75% above TSLA open
entry_rules.step_3_entry_time: 9:45 AM ET — enter at VWAP of the first post-ORB bar
entry_rules.step_4_entry_price: Limit order at VWAP value of the 9:45 AM bar

exit_rules.target: ORB high (max price of first 15-min candle)
exit_rules.time_stop: Market close at 3:50 PM ET if neither target nor stop hit

notes: Strategy is regime-dependent — works best in bull markets (QQQ trending up)
May 5 was the only loss: reversal after exhaustion gap. Watch for this pattern.
Sample size is small (6 trades). Re-evaluate after 30 real trades.
Entry at VWAP gives better R:R than raw ORB entry (V1 comparison: -$0.56 vs +$9.25 PnL)
